subcodes.first_line: We have, this day, turned Our faces toward the garden and have revealed unto thee, O Joseph [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: اصبحنا الیوم مقبلا الی البستان وردنا و انزلنا لک یا یوسف
subcodes.subjects: @suffering and imprisonment, @proclamation to divines; to religious leaders, @prayer for protection, @call to action, @prayer for service
